title: Bullet in the Head
overview: Ion is a seemingly normal guy whose life goes by without a hitch. A phone call; a meeting with a friend; small, unimportant everyday situations. One day he gets into a car with two other people. They cross the border between Spain and France. The next morning, their lives will change forever.

trailers.title: "Tiro en la cabeza" un asesinato ETA en Festival San Sebastián .
